channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Law enforcement block road near Nancy Guthrie’s home during investigation into her disappearance
item.description: Law enforcement investigating the disappearance of “Today” show host Savannah Guthrie’s mother have blocked off a road near Nancy Guthrie’s home in Arizona.

item.title: TSA agents are working without pay at US airports due to another shutdown
A year after border agent’s killing, 7 Zizians fight criminal charges in 3 states
